$roomId..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('hostUid').val() === auth.uid) || data.child('hostUid').val() === auth.uid)

game..validate: newData.hasChildren(['version','gameType','participantCount','targetScore','clockwise','names','scores','gameClock']) && (newData.child('version').val() === 5 || newData.child('version').val() === 6) && newData.child('participantCount').isNumber() && newData.child('participantCount').val() >= 2 && newData.child('participantCount').val() <= 10 && newData.child('names').numChildren() === newData.child('participantCount').val() && newData.child('scores').numChildren() === newData.child('participantCount').val() && newData.child('history').numChildren() <= 200 && (!newData.child('revision').exists() || (newData.child('revision').isNumber() && newData.child('revision').val() >= 0))

$index..validate: newData.hasChildren(['id','roundNumber','winner','winnerIndex','points','timestamp']) && newData.child('id').isString() && newData.child('id').val().length <= 80 && newData.child('roundNumber').isNumber() && newData.child('roundNumber').val() >= 1 && newData.child('winner').isString() && newData.child('winner').val().length <= 30 && newData.child('winnerIndex').isNumber() && newData.child('winnerIndex').val() >= 0 && newData.child('winnerIndex').val() < 10 && newData.child('points').isNumber() && newData.child('points').val() >= 0 && newData.child('points').val() <= 100000 && newData.child('timestamp').isNumber()

$uid..validate: !newData.exists() || (newData.hasChildren(['displayName','memberType','joinedAt','lastSeenAt']) && newData.child('displayName').isString() && newData.child('displayName').val().length > 0 && newData.child('displayName').val().length <= 30 && (newData.child('memberType').val() === 'player' || newData.child('memberType').val() === 'viewer') && newData.child('joinedAt').isNumber() && newData.child('lastSeenAt').isNumber())

$commandId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['id','sessionId','gameId','requesterUid','requesterName','actionType','payload','mode','expectedRevision','createdAt']) && newData.child('id').val() === $commandId && newData.child('sessionId').val() === $roomId && newData.child('requesterUid').val() === auth.uid && newData.child('requesterName').isString() && newData.child('requesterName').val().length <= 30 && ((newData.child('mode').val() === 'universal' && newData.child('actionType').val() === 'reverse') || (newData.child('mode').val() === 'capability' && newData.child('actionType').val().matches(/^(addRound|correctScore|starter|timerStart|timerPause|timerResume|timerReset|undoRound|editRound|deleteRound|endGame|resetGame)$/))) && newData.child('expectedRevision').isNumber() && newData.child('expectedRevision').val() >= 0 && newData.child('createdAt').isNumber()

submission..validate: newData.hasChildren(['id','sessionId','gameId','requesterUid','requesterName','actionType','payload','createdAt','status','expectedRevision']) && newData.child('id').val() === $requestId && newData.child('sessionId').val() === $roomId && newData.child('requesterUid').val() === auth.uid && newData.child('requesterName').isString() && newData.child('requesterName').val().length <= 30 && newData.child('actionType').val().matches(/^(addRound|correctScore|starter|timerStart|timerPause|timerResume|timerReset|undoRound|editRound|deleteRound|endGame|resetGame)$/) && newData.child('status').val() === 'pending' && newData.child('expectedRevision').isNumber() && newData.child('expectedRevision').val() >= 0 && newData.child('createdAt').isNumber()

$id..validate: !newData.exists() || (newData.hasChildren(['id','timestamp','actorName','actionType','outcome']) && newData.child('id').val() === $id && newData.child('timestamp').isNumber() && newData.child('actorName').isString() && newData.child('actorName').val().length <= 30 && newData.child('actionType').isString() && newData.child('outcome').isString() && newData.child('outcome').val().length <= 120)

$code..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('hostUid').val() === auth.uid) || data.child('hostUid').val() === auth.uid)
